name: senna-fury
prompt: Close-up. Red-haired woman, heat blazing — corona effect, hair lifted slightly by own power. Green eyes fierce with possessive fury. Red-orange glow intensifying. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: I'll destroy you. I'll make sure you never get close to her again. She's mine.

name: kade-laughs
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired young man actually laughing — head slightly back, genuine amusement. Low warm laugh. Heat shimmer around him, unbothered, completely unafraid. Storage room behind him. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
